evidence.claim: Built semantic search infrastructure using sentence-transformers and FAISS
evidence.source_text: Recently, I built our semantic search infrastructure from scratch — sentence-transformers, FAISS, the works.

evidence.claim: Trained and shipped ranking models using XGBoost and LightGBM
evidence.source_text: Trained and shipped multiple ranking models for our product's discovery feed using XGBoost and LightGBM.

evidence.claim: Improved revenue-per-search by 12% via learning-to-rank model
Built and operated production ML pipelines using MLflow, Kubeflow, and internal feature store
evidence.source_text: Built and operated production ML pipelines using MLflow for experiment tracking, Kubeflow for orchestration, and our internal feature store.

evidence.claim: Mentored a junior engineer through their first end-to-end ML project
evidence.source_text: Mentored a junior engineer through their first end-to-end ML project last year.

evidence.claim: Collaborated with PMs to define optimization targets for ML models
evidence.source_text: Worked closely with PMs to define the optimization target (click-through vs. dwell time vs. downstream conversion) — that work was as important as the modeling itself.

evidence.claim: Learns primarily through shipping real systems and observing production performance
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Recognizes that retrieval problems are often evaluation problems
evidence.source_text: I've learned that most retrieval problems are actually evaluation problems in disguise.

evidence.claim: Designed model monitoring stack including data drift detection and distribution checks
evidence.source_text: Designed the model monitoring stack: data drift detection, prediction distribution checks, and alerting.

evidence.claim: Evolved e-commerce search from hand-tuned scoring to learning-to-rank
evidence.source_text: Owned the ranking layer for an e-commerce search product, evolving it from a hand-tuned scoring function to a learning-to-rank model over 9 months.
